ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency as the Gatekeeper and aligns with suspicion of strangers but lacks naturalness in tone.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>1<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>Overall quality is low due to lack of context relevance, persona inconsistency as the Gatekeeper should be more authoritative and less accommodating without clearance.
